---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new measurement, chart, or CLI capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-line description of the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What WiFi/network scenario prompted this?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like it to work. Include CLI flags, config options, or chart descriptions as applicable.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples from other tools.
